title: Citrus and Spicy Canadian Pancakes
description: A twist on traditional pancakes with a hint of citrus and a kick of spice. Serve warm with a drizzle of syrup.

ingredients.name: Spicy syrup (or maple syrup with a dash of cayenne pepper)
Stir-fry mix-ins (optional, such as diced berries or chopped nuts)

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, citrus zest, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together melted butter, eggs, and spicy syrup.
Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve warm with additional spicy syrup and stir-fry mix-ins, if desired.
